title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Merck India Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Merck India Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Merck India Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Indore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Merck India Ventures Solutions:
Merck India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Merck India Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
